name: radio
title: Radio
description: Terminal-styled radio button and radio group for single-selection with bracket notation.

content.text: RadioGroupItem must be used within RadioGroup
RadioGroupItem must be used within RadioGroup

docs.description: Terminal-styled radio button and radio group for single-selection with bracket notation.

anatomy.name: RadioGroup
anatomy.note: Group root with context, selection state, and keyboard navigation

anatomy.name: RadioGroupItem
anatomy.note: Group-aware radio that reads selection from context

notes.title: Keyboard Navigation
notes.content: RadioGroup uses @diffgazer/keys's useNavigation hook internally for arrow-key navigation. All four arrow keys move focus and select items regardless of orientation (per WAI-ARIA APG radio group pattern). Home/End jump to first/last item. Space selects the focused item.

notes.title: Orientation
notes.content: Set orientation='horizontal' for inline layouts. Layout direction changes but all four arrow keys always navigate (per APG spec).

keyboard.description: All four arrow keys move focus and select items (per WAI-ARIA APG). Home/End jump to first/last item. Space selects the focused item.
